integrity.description: Agent used the ArkCase web interface to create the user.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the ArkCase URL and the UI corresponds to a web application, not a mock or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to automate the creation process outside the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running Python scripts, bash scripts, or API calls to create the user.
